power.method: 5000mAh rechargeable battery + included 3W solar panel (charges to -10C); USB-C charging

features: smart full-color night vision (auto IR/color switch)
release_notes: 5MP variant of the Cell PT 2C line (also sold in 3MP). Distinct from the plain Cell PT / Cell PT Lite (3MP). Sensor, exact focal length, IP rating and max microSD not stated on accessible official sources.

frigate.notes: 100% wire-free battery camera — it sleeps between events and does not expose a continuous local RTSP stream, so Frigate/local-NVR use is not supported. Recording is via the Imou Life app + cloud and on-device microSD.
